modules.module_title: Pooja Samagri & Preparations (पूजा सामग्री और तैयारी)
Special Poojas & Rituals (विशेष पूजाएँ और अनुष्ठान)
Mantras, Aartis & Stutis (मंत्र, आरती और स्तुति)
Ethics, Professionalism & Safety (नैतिकता, व्यावसायिकता और सुरक्षा)

questions.question: Pooja ka mukhya uddeshya kya hai?

options.A: Bhagwan se apni ichchha puri karwana
options.B: Ishwar ke prati shraddha aur bhakti vyakt karna

questions.explanation: Pooja ka mukhya uddeshya Ishwar ke prati shraddha, bhakti aur aabhar vyakt karna hai.

questions.question: Karmakand se kya abhipray hai?

options.A: Manoranjan ke liye kiye gaye karyakram
options.B: Dharmik anushthan aur riti-rivaj

questions.explanation: Karmakand ka arth hai dharmik anushthan aur riti-rivaj jo vedon mein varnit hain.

questions.question: Sanatan Dharma mein 'Dharma' shabd ka kya arth hai?

options.B: Aachar-vichar aur kartavya ka samuchchay

questions.explanation: Sanatan Dharma mein 'Dharma' ka arth hai woh aachar-vichar, kartavya aur niyam jo vyakti ko sahi marg par chalne mein madad karte hain.

questions.question: Panchamahabhutas mein nimnlikhit mein se kaun shamil nahi hai?

options.B: Vayu (Air)

questions.explanation: Panchamahabhutas hain Prithvi, Jal, Agni, Vayu aur Akash. Pani aur Jal ek hi hain, isliye F galat option hai.

questions.question: 'Sankalp' ka mahatva kya hai kisi bhi pooja mein?

options.B: Pooja ke uddeshya aur naam ka ghoshana karna
options.D: Pooja ke liye samagri ikattha karna

questions.explanation: Sankalp mein pooja karne wala vyakti apne naam, gotra, sthan aur pooja ke uddeshya ka ghoshana karta hai, jisse pooja ka phal nirdharit hota hai.

questions.question: Abhishek mein kis dravya ka upyog mukhya roop se hota hai?

options.B: Deep

questions.explanation: Abhishek mein devi-devtaon ki murtiyon ya Shivling par jal, doodh, dahi, ghee, shahad, shakkar, gangajal, aadi se snan karaya jata hai.

questions.question: Tri-Dev mein kaun se devta shamil hain?

options.B: Ram, Krishna, Shiv

questions.explanation: Tri-Dev mein Brahma (srishti ke rachnakar), Vishnu (srishti ke palanharta) aur Mahesh (Shiv, srishti ke sanharkarta) shamil hain.

questions.question: Yajna aur Havan mein kya antar hai?

options.A: Koi antar nahi hai, dono paryayvachi hain
options.B: Yajna ek bada aur vyapak anushthan hai, Havan uska chhota roop
options.C: Havan sirf ghar mein hota hai, Yajna mandir mein
options.D: Yajna mein sirf agni hoti hai, Havan mein nahi

questions.explanation: Yajna ek bade aur vyapak anushthan ka naam hai jismein kai Havan aur anya karmakand shamil ho sakte hain, jabki Havan uska ek chhota aur vishesh hissa hai jahan agni mein aahuti di jati hai.

questions.question: Pranam karne ka sahi tareeka kya hai?

options.B: Jhukkar ya saashtaang dandvat pranam karna

questions.explanation: Pranam mein shraddha se jhukna ya saashtaang dandvat pranam karna shamil hai, jo vinamrata aur samarpan darshata hai.

questions.question: 'Arpan' ka kya matlab hai pooja ke sandarbh mein?

options.B: Devta ko koi vastu ya bhaav samarpit karna
options.C: Pooja ke baad prasad grahan karna

questions.explanation: Arpan ka arth hai devta ko phool, phal, naivedya aadi samarpit karna ya apni shraddha aur bhakti ko unhe dena.

questions.question: Hindu Dharma mein 'Sanskar' ka kya mahatva hai?

options.A: Yeh sirf ek dharmik tyohar hai
options.B: Vyaktigat vikas aur shuddhi ke liye kiye gaye anushthan
options.D: Mandir mein bajaya jaane wala sangeet

questions.explanation: Sanskar vyakti ke jeevan ke vibhinn charanon par kiye jane wale anushthan hain jo uske sharir, mann aur aatma ko shuddh aur sanskarit karte hain.

questions.question: Aachman karne ka mukhya uddeshya kya hai?

options.B: Sharir aur mann ki shuddhi karna

questions.explanation: Aachman mein shuddh jal ko teen baar grahan karke sharir aur mann ki bahari aur aantrik shuddhi ki jati hai, jo pooja ke liye avashyak hai.

questions.question: Pooja mein 'Prasad' ka kya mahatva hai?

options.A: Yeh pooja ka ek hissa nahi hai
options.B: Devta ko arpit bhojan jo bad mein bhakton mein banta jata hai
options.D: Mantra jaap karne ka ek tareeka

questions.explanation: Prasad woh bhojan ya anya samagri hai jo devta ko arpit ki jati hai aur fir unka aashirwad maankar bhakton mein banta jata hai.

questions.question: Vedic shabdon mein, 'Rishi' kise kehte hain?

options.B: Gyan aur tapasya se sampann mahapurush

questions.explanation: Rishi un mahapurushon ko kaha jata hai jinhone gyan, tapasya aur dhyan ke madhyam se adhyatmik satya ko prapt kiya ho.

questions.question: 'Murti' aur 'Vigrah' mein kya antar hai?

options.A: Murti devta ka roop hai aur Vigrah uski pran-pratishtha ke baad ka roop
options.B: Dono bilkul ek hi hain
options.C: Murti choti hoti hai aur Vigrah bada
options.D: Murti ghar mein hoti hai aur Vigrah mandir mein

questions.explanation: Murti devta ka ek pratik roop hai, jabki Vigrah us murti ko kehte hain jismein pran-pratishtha sanskar ke dwara devta ka aavahan kiya gaya ho, jisse vah pujaniya ban jati hai.

questions.question: Hindu parampara mein 'Yantra' ka kya mahatva hai?

options.B: Yeh ek bhautik upkaran hai
options.C: Yeh ek adhyatmik aarekh hai jo devta ki shakti ko darshata hai
options.D: Yeh ek prakar ka vastra hai

questions.explanation: Yantra ek pavitra aarekh ya rekha-chitran hai jo kisi vishesh devta ki shakti, urja aur roop ka pratinidhitv karta hai, aur pooja mein iska upyog shakti ko aakarshit karne ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Pooja mein 'Kalash Sthapana' ka kya arth hai?

options.B: Ek pavitra ghada sthapit karna jo devta ka pratik hai
options.C: Pooja samagri ko ek jagah rakhna

questions.explanation: Kalash Sthapana mein ek pavitra ghada (kalash) sthapit kiya jata hai jise devta ka pratik mana jata hai aur usmein gangajal, sikke, supari aadi daal kar mangalmayta ka aavahan kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Pooja mein 'Akshat' ka kya mahatva hai?

options.A: Yeh swad ke liye istemal hota hai
options.B: Yeh avinashi aur purnata ka pratik hai
options.C: Yeh sirf sajawat ke liye hai
options.D: Yeh dhoop jalane ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Akshat (sabut chawal) avinashi, purnata aur samriddhi ka pratik hai, isliye pooja mein iska upyog kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Pooja ke liye phoolon ka chayan karte samay kis baat ka dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Taze aur saaf phool, jo murjhaye na hon

questions.explanation: Pooja mein hamesha taze, saaf aur murjhaye na hue phoolon ka hi upyog karna chahiye kyuki ve shuddhi aur naveenta ka pratik hote hain.

questions.question: Deep prajwalan ke liye kis tel ka upyog karna shubh mana jata hai?

options.B: Sarson ka tel (Mustard oil)

questions.explanation: Deep prajwalan ke liye ghee (gaay ka ghee vishesh roop se) ya til ka tel shubh mana jata hai, kyuki yeh pavitrata aur sakaratmak urja ka pratik hai.

questions.question: Pooja mein 'Kumkum' aur 'Haldi' ka kya upyog hai?

options.B: Devta ko tilak lagane aur shringar ke liye
options.C: Pooja sthal ki safai ke liye

questions.explanation: Kumkum aur Haldi shubh aur pavitrata ke pratik hain. Inka upyog devta ko tilak lagane, shringar karne aur mangalmayta ke liye kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Naivedya mein kaun si cheezein shamil ki jati hain?

options.B: Mithai, phal, doodh, chawal aadi shuddh bhojan

questions.explanation: Naivedya mein devta ko arpit karne ke liye shuddh, satvik bhojan jaise mithai, phal, doodh, chawal, daal aadi shamil kiye jate hain.

questions.question: Pooja ke liye aasan ka mahatva kya hai?

options.A: Yeh sirf baithne ke liye hai
options.B: Yeh prithvi se utpann hone wali nakaratmak urja se bachata hai
options.C: Yeh pooja ko lambe samay tak chalata hai
options.D: Yeh pooja sthal ko sajata hai

questions.explanation: Aasan par baithne se sadhak ka sharir prithvi se sidha sampark mein nahi aata, jisse pooja ke dauran utpann hone wali urja ka sanchay hota hai aur nakaratmak urja se bachav hota hai.

questions.question: Pooja mein 'Panchamrit' kaise banaya jata hai?

options.B: Doodh, dahi, ghee, shahad aur shakkar ka mishran

questions.explanation: Panchamrit doodh, dahi, ghee, shahad aur shakkar (ya mishri) ke mishran se banta hai, jo pavitrata aur shuddhi ka pratik hai.

questions.question: Pooja sthal ki safai karte samay kis baat ka vishesh dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Chemically strong cleaners use karna
options.C: Pavitrata, shuddhi aur samman ka dhyan rakhna

questions.explanation: Pooja sthal ki safai karte samay pavitrata, shuddhi aur samman ka dhyan rakhna chahiye. Saaf pani aur kapde ka upyog karein, aur us sthal ki pavitrata ko banaye rakhein.

questions.question: Pooja mein 'Vastra' arpan ka kya mahatva hai?

options.B: Devta ko alankrit karna aur samman dena

questions.explanation: Vastra arpan devta ko alankrit karne, unka samman karne aur unhe shuddh roop mein darshane ka ek tareeka hai.

questions.question: Havan kund ke liye kis lakdi ka upyog karna shubh mana jata hai?

options.B: Kikar ya babool ki lakdi
options.C: Aam, Bargad, Peepal ya Chandan ki lakdi

questions.explanation: Havan kund mein Aam, Bargad, Peepal, Chandan, Palash jaise pavitra vrikshon ki lakdi ka upyog karna shubh mana jata hai, kyuki inmein pavitrata aur aushadhiya gun hote hain.

questions.question: Pooja mein 'Ilaichi' aur 'Laung' ka kya upyog hai?

options.B: Sugandhit dravya ke roop mein aur shuddhi ke liye

questions.explanation: Ilaichi aur Laung ko sugandhit dravya ke roop mein aur pooja sthal ko shuddh karne ke liye upyog kiya jata hai, saath hi yeh naivedya mein bhi shamil hote hain.

questions.question: Pooja mein 'Supari' (betel nut) ka kya mahatva hai?

options.A: Yeh sirf khane ke liye hai
options.B: Yeh Ganesh ji ka pratik hai aur shubh mana jata hai
options.C: Yeh pooja sthal ko saaf karta hai

questions.explanation: Supari ko shubh aur pavitra mana jata hai, aur ise Ganesh ji ka pratik bhi mana jata hai. Kai poojaon mein ise devta ko arpit kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Pooja mein 'Ghanta' (bell) bajane ka kya uddeshya hai?

options.B: Nakaratmak urja ko door karna aur sakaratmak mahol banana

questions.explanation: Ghanta bajane se utpann dhwani nakaratmak urja ko door karti hai, vatavaran ko shuddh karti hai aur devta ko aavahan karti hai.

questions.question: Pooja ki samagri ko vyavasthit (arrange) kaise karna chahiye?

options.A: Kisi bhi tarah se rakh sakte hain
options.B: Ek nishchit kram aur pavitrata ke saath
options.D: Jahan jagah mile wahan rakh do

questions.explanation: Pooja ki samagri ko ek nishchit kram aur pavitrata ke saath vyavasthit karna chahiye, jisse pooja mein vyavastitha bani rahe aur shuddhi ka mahol ho.

questions.question: Pooja mein 'Chandan' ka upyog kis roop mein kiya jata hai?

options.A: Bhojan mein masale ke roop mein
options.B: Sugandh aur shitalta ke liye devta ko tilak lagane mein

questions.explanation: Chandan ko sugandhit aur shital mana jata hai. Iska upyog devta ko tilak lagane, unka shringar karne aur pooja sthal ko sugandhit karne ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Pooja ke liye 'Patra' (bartan) kis dhatu ke hone chahiye?

options.B: Steel ya Iron

questions.explanation: Pooja ke liye Copper (tambaa), Brass (pittal), Silver (chandi) ya Gold (sona) jaise shuddh dhaatuon ke bartan shubh aur pavitra mane jate hain, kyuki yeh urja ko sanchayit karte hain.

questions.question: Pooja mein 'Dhoop' jalane ka kya mahatva hai?

options.B: Sugandhit vatavaran banane aur nakaratmak shaktiyon ko door karne ke liye
options.D: Pooja ko jaldi khatam karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Dhoop jalane se sugandhit dhuan utpann hota hai jo vatavaran ko shuddh karta hai, nakaratmak shaktiyon ko door karta hai aur ek pavitra mahol banata hai.

questions.question: Dainik pooja shuru karne se pehle sabse pehla kadam kya hai?

options.B: Deep prajwalan karna
options.C: Sharir aur mann ki shuddhi karna (snan aadi)

questions.explanation: Dainik pooja shuru karne se pehle sharir aur mann ki shuddhi bahut mahatvapurn hai, jiske liye snan aur pavitra vastra dharan karna chahiye.

questions.question: Pooja mein 'Deep Prajwalan' kis disha mein karna chahiye?

options.B: Paschim (West)

questions.explanation: Deep prajwalan Poorv (East) ya Uttar (North) disha mein karna shubh mana jata hai, kyuki yeh dishaen sakaratmak urja se judi hain.

questions.question: Dainik pooja mein 'Sankalp' ka uchcharan kab kiya jata hai?

options.B: Pooja shuru hone se pehle

questions.explanation: Sankalp pooja shuru hone se pehle kiya jata hai, jismein vyakti pooja ka uddeshya aur apna naam aadi batata hai.

questions.question: Pooja mein 'Pushp Arpan' ka sahi tareeka kya hai?

options.B: Devta ke charanon mein shraddha se arpit karna
options.D: Murti ke upar phoolon ka dher laga dena

questions.explanation: Pushp Arpan mein phoolon ko devta ke charanon mein shraddha aur bhakti ke saath arpit karna chahiye.

questions.question: Dhoop aur Deep dikhane ka sahi kram kya hai?

options.B: Pehle Dhoop fir Deep

questions.explanation: Samanya pooja vidhi mein pehle Dhoop dikhaya jata hai, uske baad Deep dikhaya jata hai.

questions.question: Naivedya arpan karte samay kaun sa mantra bolna chahiye?

options.B: Om Gan Ganapataye Namah

questions.explanation: Naivedya arpan karte samay 'Om Amritopastaranamasi Swaha' ya 'Om Pranaya Swaha, Apanaya Swaha...' jaise mantra bole jate hain jo bhojan ko pavitra karte hain.

questions.question: Aarti ke baad kya karna avashyak hai?

options.B: Prasad grahan karna
options.C: Devta ko pranam karna aur aashirwad lena

questions.explanation: Aarti ke baad devta ko pranam karna aur unka aashirwad lena bahut mahatvapurn hai, jisse pooja ka phal prapt hota hai.

questions.question: Dainik pooja mein 'Achman' kitni baar kiya jata hai?

options.B: Do baar

questions.explanation: Achman teen baar kiya jata hai, jismein har baar thoda sa jal hatheli mein lekar grahan kiya jata hai, shuddhi ke uddeshya se.

questions.question: Pooja mein 'Tilak' lagane ka kya mahatva hai?

options.B: Yeh shubh, pavitrata aur adhyatmik chetna ka pratik hai
options.C: Yeh dhoop se bachav ke liye hai
options.D: Yeh chehre ko sundar banata hai

questions.explanation: Tilak lagana shubh, pavitrata aur adhyatmik chetna ka pratik hai. Yeh mastishk ke 'ajna chakra' ko sakriya karta hai.

questions.question: Subah ki pooja ke liye kaun sa samay sabse shubh mana jata hai?

options.B: Sham (Evening)

questions.explanation: Brahmamuhurta (suraj nikalne se lagbhag 90 minute pehle) dainik pooja aur dhyan ke liye sabse shubh samay mana jata hai, kyuki is samay vatavaran shuddh aur shant hota hai.

questions.question: Pooja ke dauran 'Ghanta Nad' (bell ringing) kab kiya jata hai?

options.B: Pooja ke shuruat mein, mantra jaap ke dauran aur aarti ke samay

questions.explanation: Ghanta Nad pooja ke shuruat mein devta ka aavahan karne ke liye, mantra jaap ke dauran aur aarti ke samay kiya jata hai, jisse vatavaran shuddh hota hai.

questions.question: Pooja mein 'Jal Arpan' karte samay kis disha mein jal girana chahiye?

options.B: Devta ke saamne niche ki aur

questions.explanation: Jal Arpan karte samay jal ko devta ke saamne, ek patra ya bhoomi par, niche ki aur girana chahiye, isse jal ko shuddh aur pavitra dravya mana jata hai.

questions.question: Pooja ke ant mein 'Visarjan' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Pooja samagri ko ikattha karna
options.C: Devta ko vida karna aur unki shakti ko apne andar samahit karna

questions.explanation: Visarjan ka arth hai pooja ke ant mein devta ko vida karna aur unki shakti ko apne andar ya universe mein samahit karna. Yeh murti ko jal mein pravahit karne se bhi hota hai.

questions.question: Pooja mein 'Pradakshina' kitni baar karni chahiye?

options.B: Teen baar

questions.explanation: Samanya pooja mein devta ki teen baar pradakshina (parikrama) karna shubh mana jata hai, jo sharir, mann aur aatma ki shuddhi ka pratik hai.

questions.question: Pooja karte samay kis disha ki aur mukh karke baithna shubh hota hai?

options.B: Paschim (West)

questions.explanation: Pooja karte samay Poorv (East) ya Uttar (North) disha ki aur mukh karke baithna shubh mana jata hai, kyuki yeh dishaen sakaratmak urja aur devtaon se judi hain.

questions.question: Pooja ke dauran 'Pavitra' (sacred thread) dharan karne ka kya mahatva hai?

options.B: Yeh shuddhi aur pavitrata ka pratik hai, aur pooja ki shakti ko sanchalit karta hai
options.D: Yeh pooja ko aakarshak banata hai

questions.explanation: Pavitra (jaise janeu ya kusha ki anguthi) dharan karna shuddhi aur pavitrata ka pratik hai. Yeh pooja ke dauran utpann hone wali adhyatmik urja ko sanchalit aur sanrakshit karta hai.

questions.question: Pooja ke ant mein 'Kshama Prarthana' ka kya uddeshya hai?

options.A: Devta ko galti ke liye maaf karna
options.B: Pooja mein hui anjane mein galtiyon ke liye kshama mangna

questions.explanation: Kshama Prarthana pooja ke ant mein ki jati hai, jismein pooja mein hui kisi bhi anjane galti ya kami ke liye devta se kshama mangi jati hai.

questions.question: Diwali ka tyohar kis devi-devta ko samarpit hai mukhya roop se?

options.B: Goddess Saraswati

questions.explanation: Diwali mukhya roop se Dhan ki devi Lakshmi aur shubh-labh ke devta Ganesh ji ko samarpit hai.

questions.question: Navratri mein kis devi ke nau roopon ki pooja ki jati hai?

options.B: Goddess Saraswati

questions.explanation: Navratri mein Goddess Durga ke nau roopon (Navadurga) ki pooja ki jati hai.

questions.question: Satyanarayan Katha kis devta ko samarpit hai?

options.B: Lord Vishnu

questions.explanation: Satyanarayan Katha Lord Vishnu ke Satya roop ko samarpit hai, jo jeevan mein satya aur dharma ke mahatva ko batati hai.

questions.question: Griha Pravesh pooja ka mukhya uddeshya kya hai?

options.A: Naye ghar ko sajane ke liye
options.B: Naye ghar mein sukh, shanti aur samriddhi lane ke liye
options.D: Sirf ek party karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Griha Pravesh pooja naye ghar mein pravesh karne se pehle ki jati hai, jiska uddeshya ghar mein sakaratmak urja, sukh, shanti aur samriddhi lana hai.

questions.question: Shivratri ka tyohar kis devta ko samarpit hai?

options.B: Lord Krishna

questions.explanation: Shivratri ka tyohar Lord Shiva ko samarpit hai, jismein unki pooja, vrat aur jaagran kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Rudraksha mala ka upyog kisliye kiya jata hai?

options.B: Mantra jaap aur adhyatmik shuddhi ke liye

questions.explanation: Rudraksha mala ko mantra jaap karne, dhyan lagane aur adhyatmik shuddhi ke liye upyog kiya jata hai. Ise Lord Shiva se joda jata hai.

questions.question: Havan mein 'Aahuti' kisko di jati hai?

options.B: Devtaon ko agni ke madhyam se

questions.explanation: Havan mein Aahuti devtaon ko agni ke madhyam se di jati hai. Agni ko devtaon tak sandesh pahunchane wala mana jata hai.

questions.question: Janmashtami ka tyohar kis devta ke janmotsav ke roop mein manaya jata hai?

options.B: Lord Shiva

questions.explanation: Janmashtami Lord Krishna ke janmotsav ke roop mein manaya jata hai.

questions.question: Shaligram kya hai aur iska kya mahatva hai?

options.A: Yeh ek pathar hai jise sajawat ke liye upyog karte hain
options.B: Yeh ek pavitra pathar hai jise Lord Vishnu ka pratik mana jata hai
options.C: Yeh ek prakar ka phool hai

questions.explanation: Shaligram ek pavitra shila (pathar) hai jo mukhya roop se Nepal ki Gandaki nadi mein paya jata hai. Ise Lord Vishnu ka saakshaat pratik mana jata hai aur iski pooja ki jati hai.

questions.question: Chhath Pooja kis devta ko samarpit hai?

options.B: Surya Dev (Sun God)

questions.explanation: Chhath Pooja mukhya roop se Surya Dev (Surya Bhagwan) aur Chhathi Maiya ko samarpit hai, jismein surya ko arghya diya jata hai.

questions.question: Ganesh Chaturthi par kis devta ki pooja ki jati hai?

options.B: Lord Vishnu

questions.explanation: Ganesh Chaturthi par Lord Ganesha ki pooja ki jati hai, jo shubh aarambh aur vighna-harta ke roop mein jane jate hain.

questions.question: Pooja mein 'Tulsi' ke patton ka kya mahatva hai?

options.A: Yeh sirf khane ke liye hai
options.B: Yeh pavitra mana jata hai aur Lord Vishnu ko priya hai
options.C: Yeh pooja sthal ko saaf karta hai

questions.explanation: Tulsi ke patte bahut pavitra mane jate hain aur Lord Vishnu aur unke avataron (jaise Krishna) ko vishesh roop se priya hain. Inka upyog pooja mein shuddhi aur bhakti ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Havan mein 'Samidha' ka kya arth hai?

options.B: Agni mein aahuti ke liye upyog ki jane wali lakdi
options.C: Havan kund ko banane wali mitti

questions.explanation: Samidha woh lakdi ya kathi hai jise Havan mein agni prajwalan aur aahuti dene ke liye upyog kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Pooja mein 'Shankh' (conch shell) bajane ka kya mahatva hai?

options.B: Yeh shubh dhwani utpann karta hai aur nakaratmak shaktiyon ko door karta hai
options.C: Yeh sirf sajawat ke liye hai
options.D: Yeh paani peene ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Shankh bajane se utpann dhwani bahut shubh mani jati hai. Yeh nakaratmak shaktiyon ko door karti hai, vatavaran ko shuddh karti hai aur devtaon ka aavahan karti hai.

questions.question: Pitru Paksha ka mukhya uddeshya kya hai?

options.B: Pitaron (purvajon) ko shraddha aur tarpan arpit karna

questions.explanation: Pitru Paksha mein apne pitaron (purvajon) ki aatma ki shanti aur santushti ke liye shraddha, tarpan aur anya karmakand kiye jate hain.

questions.question: Pooja mein 'Kalawa' (Mauli) bandhne ka kya mahatva hai?

options.B: Yeh raksha, shubh aur pavitrata ka pratik hai
options.D: Yeh sharir ko garmi deta hai

questions.explanation: Kalawa ya Mauli ko raksha sutra mana jata hai. Ise dharan karne se shubh, pavitrata aur devtaon ka aashirwad prapt hota hai.

questions.question: Rudrabhishek pooja kis devta ke liye vishesh roop se ki jati hai?

options.B: Lord Brahma

questions.explanation: Rudrabhishek pooja Lord Shiva ko prasann karne ke liye vishesh roop se ki jati hai, jismein Shivling ka jal, doodh aur anya dravyon se abhishek kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Gayatri Mantra kis devta ko samarpit hai?

options.B: Goddess Lakshmi

questions.explanation: Gayatri Mantra vedon ka sabse mahatvapurn mantra hai aur yeh Savitur (Surya Dev) ko samarpit hai, jo gyan aur prakash ke devta hain.

questions.question: Mantra jaap karte samay 'mala' ka upyog kisliye kiya jata hai?

options.B: Mantra ki sankhya gine ke liye
options.D: Pooja sthal ko sajane ke liye

questions.explanation: Mala ka upyog mantra jaap ki sankhya gine ke liye kiya jata hai, jisse jaap mein ekagrata aur niyamitata bani rehti hai.

questions.question: Mahamrityunjaya Mantra ka mukhya uddeshya kya hai?

options.B: Deerghayu, swasthya aur mrityu bhay se mukti ke liye

questions.explanation: Mahamrityunjaya Mantra Lord Shiva ko samarpit hai aur iska jaap deerghayu, swasthya, aur mrityu ke bhay se mukti ke liye kiya jata hai.

questions.question: 'Om Jai Jagdish Hare' aarti kis devta ki hai?

options.B: Lord Vishnu

questions.explanation: 'Om Jai Jagdish Hare' aarti Lord Vishnu ko samarpit hai, jo palanharta ke roop mein jane jate hain.

questions.question: Mantra jaap mein 'Uchcharan Shuddhi' ka kya mahatva hai?

options.B: Galat uchcharan se mantra ka prabhav kam ho sakta hai ya galat phal mil sakta hai
options.D: Jaldi se jaap khatam karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Mantra jaap mein uchcharan shuddhi (correct pronunciation) bahut mahatvapurn hai, kyuki galat uchcharan se mantra ki shakti aur prabhav kam ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Ganesh Mantra 'Om Gan Ganapataye Namah' ka kya arth hai?

options.A: Main Shiv ko pranam karta hoon
options.B: Main Ganesh Bhagwan ko pranam karta hoon
options.C: Main Vishnu Bhagwan ko pranam karta hoon
options.D: Main Lakshmi Mata ko pranam karta hoon

questions.explanation: Is mantra ka arth hai 'Main vighnaharta, Ganapati Bhagwan ko pranam karta hoon'.

questions.question: 'Stuti' ka kya matlab hai pooja ke sandarbh mein?

options.B: Devta ki stuti (prashansa) mein gaaye gaye geet ya shlok

questions.explanation: Stuti devta ki prashansa, mahima aur gunon ka varnan karne wale geet ya shlok hote hain, jo bhakti bhaav se gaaye jate hain.

questions.question: Aarti karte samay kitni battiyon ka deepak shubh mana jata hai?

options.B: Teen batti

questions.explanation: Aarti karte samay paanch battiyon wala deepak (Panchmukhi Deep) shubh mana jata hai, jo Panchamahabhutas ka pratik hai.

questions.question: Mantra jaap ke liye kaun si disha mein mukh karna shubh hai?

options.B: Paschim (West)

questions.explanation: Mantra jaap ke liye Poorv (East) ya Uttar (North) disha mein mukh karke baithna shubh mana jata hai, jisse sakaratmak urja ka sanchar hota hai.

questions.question: 'Om' (Pranav Mantra) ka kya mahatva hai?

options.B: Yeh sabhi mantron ka mul, brahmand ki aadi dhwani hai
options.C: Yeh ek devta ka naam hai

questions.explanation: Om ko Pranav Mantra kaha jata hai. Yeh sabhi mantron ka mul hai aur brahmand ki aadi dhwani mani jati hai, jo paramatma ka pratik hai.

questions.question: Aarti ke baad 'Kapur' (camphor) jalane ka kya uddeshya hai?

options.B: Vatavaran ko shuddh karna aur nakaratmak urja ko door karna

questions.explanation: Kapur jalane se vatavaran shuddh hota hai, nakaratmak urja door hoti hai aur ek pavitra sugandh failti hai. Yeh aatma ki shuddhi ka bhi pratik hai.

questions.question: Shanti Mantras ka upyog kisliye kiya jata hai?

options.B: Shaanti aur samanjasya ke liye prarthana karna

questions.explanation: Shanti Mantras ka upyog shanti, samanjasya aur kalyan ke liye kiya jata hai, jo sharirik, mansik aur adhyatmik shanti ki kamna karte hain.

questions.question: Devi Mantras ka jaap kis liye kiya jata hai?

options.A: Sirf devi ko pranam karne ke liye
options.B: Shakti, samriddhi, gyan aur raksha prapt karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Devi Mantras ka jaap shakti (power), samriddhi (prosperity), gyan (knowledge) aur raksha (protection) prapt karne ke liye kiya jata hai, kyuki Devi ko in sabhi shaktiyon ka srot mana jata hai.

questions.question: Mantra jaap karte samay 'mala' ko kis haath mein pakadna chahiye?

options.B: Sirf baayein haath mein

questions.explanation: Mantra jaap karte samay mala ko daayein haath mein pakadna chahiye, aur anguthe aur madhyama ungli ka upyog manke (beads) ko ghumane ke liye karna chahiye.

questions.question: 'Dhyan' ka kya mahatva hai mantra jaap ke dauran?

options.B: Mann ko ekagra karna aur devta par kendrit karna

questions.explanation: Mantra jaap ke dauran dhyan ka mahatva mann ko ekagra karna aur devta ke roop ya mantra ke arth par kendrit karna hai, jisse jaap ka prabhav badhta hai.

questions.question: Kirtan aur Bhajan mein kya antar hai?

options.A: Koi antar nahi, dono ek hi hain
options.B: Kirtan samuhik roop se naam jaap hai, Bhajan vyaktigat bhakti geet hai
options.C: Kirtan sirf mandir mein hota hai, Bhajan ghar mein
options.D: Kirtan mein sirf sangeet hota hai, Bhajan mein nahi

questions.explanation: Kirtan mukhya roop se samuhik naam jaap aur devta ke gun gaan ka praroop hai, jismein log ek saath gaate hain. Bhajan vyaktigat bhakti geet hote hain jo aksar ek ya kuch vyaktiyon dwara gaaye jate hain.

questions.question: Ek pooja vidhi professional ke liye 'Shauch' (purity) ka kya arth hai?

options.B: Sharirik aur mansik dono prakar ki shuddhi

questions.explanation: Shauch ka arth hai sharirik (bahari) aur mansik (aantrik) dono prakar ki shuddhi. Yeh pooja ke liye avashyak hai.

questions.question: Pooja karte samay 'Anushasan' (discipline) ka kya mahatva hai?

options.A: Yeh pooja ko boring banata hai
options.B: Pooja ko sahi vidhi aur niyam se karne mein madad karta hai
options.D: Sirf dusron ko prabhavit karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Anushasan pooja ko sahi vidhi, niyam aur samay par karne mein madad karta hai, jisse pooja ka sahi phal milta hai.

questions.question: Pooja ke dauran 'Bhakt' ke prati aapka vyavahar kaisa hona chahiye?

options.B: Samman, vinamrata aur sahanubhuti se

questions.explanation: Ek pooja vidhi professional ko bhakt ke prati hamesha samman, vinamrata aur sahanubhuti se vyavahar karna chahiye.

questions.question: Havan karte samay agni suraksha (fire safety) ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Havan kund ke paas pani ya ret rakhna

questions.explanation: Havan karte samay agni suraksha ke liye havan kund ke paas pani ki balti ya ret (sand) rakhna avashyak hai, aur aas-paas jalne wali cheezon ko door rakhna chahiye.

questions.question: Pooja ke liye 'Time Management' ka kya mahatva hai?

options.B: Pooja ko sahi samay par shuru aur samapt karne ke liye
options.C: Jaldi se jaldi pooja khatam karna

questions.explanation: Time Management bahut mahatvapurn hai taaki pooja sahi samay par shuru aur samapt ho sake, aur bhakton ko bhi suvidha ho.

questions.question: Agar kisi bhakt ko pooja ke dauran koi sandeh ho, toh aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Uski baat dhyan se sunna aur vinamrata se samjhana
options.D: Use pooja se bahar nikal dena

questions.explanation: Bhakt ke sandeh ko dhyan se sunna chahiye aur vinamrata aur gyan ke saath usse samjhana chahiye.

questions.question: Pooja sthal ki 'Pavitrata' (sanctity) kaise banaye rakhi jati hai?

options.B: Safai, shuddhi aur maryada ka palan karke

questions.explanation: Pooja sthal ki pavitrata safai, shuddhi, niyamit pooja aur maryada ka palan karke banaye rakhi jati hai.

questions.question: Pooja samagri ki 'gunvatta' (quality) ka kya mahatva hai?

options.B: Achhi gunvatta ki samagri pooja ke prabhav ko badhati hai
options.C: Sasti samagri hi istemal karni chahiye

questions.explanation: Achhi gunvatta ki shuddh aur tazi pooja samagri pooja ke prabhav aur shubh phal ko badhati hai.

questions.question: Ek pooja professional ko apne 'Gyan' ko kaise update karte rehna chahiye?

options.B: Dharmik granthon ka adhyayan, anubhav aur gurujanon se seekhkar

questions.explanation: Ek pooja professional ko dharmik granthon ka niyamit adhyayan, anubhav se seekhna aur gurujanon se margdarshan lekar apne gyan ko update karte rehna chahiye.

questions.question: Pooja ke baad 'Dakshina' (offering) ke prati aapka kya drishtikon hona chahiye?

options.B: Jo shraddha se mile use swikar karna, aur dhan se zyada bhakti ko mahatva dena
options.D: Bhakton ko dakshina dene ke liye majboor karna

questions.explanation: Dakshina shraddha ka pratik hai. Jo shraddha se mile use swikar karna chahiye, aur dhan se zyada bhakti aur seva ko mahatva dena chahiye.

questions.question: Pooja ke dauran 'Mobile Phone' ka upyog kaise karna chahiye?

options.B: Silent mode par rakhna aur avashyakta na hone par upyog na karna

questions.explanation: Pooja ke dauran mobile phone ko silent mode par rakhna chahiye aur avashyakta na hone par uska upyog nahi karna chahiye, jisse pooja ki pavitrata aur ekagrata bani rahe.

questions.question: Kisi vishesh pooja ke liye 'Muhurat' ka chayan karte samay kya dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Jyotish shastra ke anusar shubh samay ka chayan karna

questions.explanation: Muhurat ka chayan karte samay jyotish shastra ke anusar shubh samay ka dhyan rakhna chahiye, jisse pooja ka shubh phal prapt ho.

questions.question: Pooja ke dauran 'Vani ki Shuddhi' ka kya mahatva hai?

options.B: Mantra aur shlokon ka sahi aur spasht uchcharan karna

questions.explanation: Vani ki shuddhi ka mahatva hai mantra aur shlokon ka sahi aur spasht uchcharan karna, jisse unki shakti aur prabhav bana rahe.

questions.question: Ek pooja professional ko 'Vyaktigat Swachhta' (personal hygiene) ka kaise dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Niyamit snan, saaf vastra aur shuddhata ka palan karna

questions.explanation: Niyamit snan, saaf vastra dharan karna aur samanya shuddhata ka palan karna ek pooja professional ke liye bahut avashyak hai.

questions.question: Agar pooja ke dauran koi unexpected situation (jaise bijli jana) aaye toh aap kaise react karenge?

options.A: Ghabra jayenge aur pooja rok denge
options.B: Shanti se sthiti ko handle karenge aur alternate arrangements karenge

questions.explanation: Ek professional ko aisi sthiti mein shanti banaye rakhni chahiye, turant alternate arrangements (jaise deepak jalana) karne chahiye aur pooja ko jari rakhna chahiye.

questions.question: Pooja ke baad 'Visarjan' (immersion) ki samagri ka kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Pavitra nadi ya jal strot mein pravahit karna ya mitti mein dabana

questions.explanation: Pooja ke baad ki visarjan samagri (jaise phool, nirmalya) ko pavitra nadi, jal strot mein pravahit karna chahiye ya phir mitti mein dabana chahiye, jisse unki pavitrata bani rahe.
